title: Time Synced
description: A cozy mod pack where the daylight cycle and seasons are synced to real time. Gives the feel of playing Animal Crossing or Stardew Valley.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e6aaa7fd6f3b45f482b5622b177c331df6410eb.png)

Immerse yourself in a serene Minecraft world where the daylight cycle and seasons follow real-world time. This modpack brings the beauty of nature into your game, with each season matching the real-world calendar, allowing you to experience the changing landscapes, weather, and activities as you would in the real world. 

Cozy up in your custom-built homes with warm, inviting décor, and enjoy seasonal events, crafting, and farming that align with each passing season. Perfect for players who love a relaxing, immersive Minecraft experience with a touch of realism.

If you enjoy games like Animal Crossing & Stardew Valley, you're sure to enjoy this mod pack!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wfdegQweIn0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rqFAlw8dEsA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**IF YOU WANT TO PLAY WITHOUT THE TIME AND/OR SEASON SYNC YOU CAN EDIT THE CONFIG**
